title: 4x4 Gift Album by Shanna
excerpt: I love taking that extra step when giving gifts!!!! Last year for Christmas Addison got an instax camera (she has wanted one for years) so I wanted to get her a little album as well but what fun is it…
body:
I love taking that extra step when giving gifts!!!! Last year for Christmas Addison got an instax camera (she has wanted one for years) so I wanted to get her a little album as well but what fun is it to give her an empty album? I wanted to simply have some papers already cut to size so that was one less thing she needed to do, I also wanted to keep it very simple so she could decide where to take it from there!! I love the 4x4 cut apart paper from Stitched, and the sentiments were perfect so I started there! I simply cut all the paper down and put them in all the 4x4 pockets that came with the album, then I took the 2x2 square pocket pages and inserted them in a pattern between the 4x4 pages. I took the adorable puffy stickers from stitched and applied in the middle so she could easily still use the pockets. I feel like she is more likely to use it now that she has a jump off point!! 

I love how this album came together and I know she will love it!!

What a fantastic gift! Thanks for sharing, Shanna! Other Design Team member posts can be found here. Shop for Amy Tangerine products at your local scrapbook stores and online at Simon Says Stamp and Blue Moon Scrapbooking and Scrapbook.com.
